calendar.matters:
MASTER CALENDAR JURY
Off Calendar Jan-10-2008 Vacated

OTHER SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Jan-09-2008 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES: Judge Pro Tem Joe Ragazzo, Clerk Carla Amador, Not Reported. (218/206)

Appearances:
David Hasbrouck, property manager, appearing on behalf of plaintiff John Stewart Company.
Attorney, John P. Zanghi, is present representing the plaintiff.

Defendant, Thomas Welch, is present.
Eric L. Lifschitz, is present representing the defendant through limited scope.

This matter comes on calendar for an Unlawful Detainer Settlement Conference. The Judge Pro Tem, litigants and counsel confer privately for settlement discussions.

The parties enter into a sign agreement, which was filed. See scanned document for the settlement terms contained in the signed agreement for the premises located on 140 Jones Street #612, San Francisco, CA.

This case settled, the trial date of January 14, 2008 is vacated.
